{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Akura clan's fallen daughter
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The [[Akura clan]] has a fallen daughter whom they have instructed the [[Blackflame Empire]] to push to the brink.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c14">''Skysworn'', chapter 14</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
